Findings.Title: VM is not part of an availability set or availability zone
Findings.Detail: Virtual machine vm-web-01 is deployed without an availability set or availability zone. Single-instance VMs do not qualify for the 99.9% SLA.
Findings.Remediation: Redeploy the VM into an availability zone or availability set to improve resiliency.

Findings.Title: SQL Server does not have geo-replication configured
Findings.Detail: SQL Server sql-prod-01 does not have active geo-replication or auto-failover groups configured. A regional outage could result in data loss.
Findings.Remediation: Configure active geo-replication or auto-failover groups for business-critical databases.
